criteria.name: AI-Powered Insights
criteria.description: The app leverages AI to provide users with actionable insights and personalized advice based on their financial data.

criteria.name: Automation Capabilities
criteria.description: The app automates financial tasks such as expense tracking, transaction categorization, invoice management, and bill payments.

criteria.name: Predictive Analytics
criteria.description: The app uses AI to forecast financial outcomes, predict market trends, and identify potential risks or opportunities.

criteria.name: User-Friendly Interface
criteria.description: The app offers a clean, intuitive design that simplifies complex financial data and makes it easy for users to navigate and understand their finances.

criteria.name: Data Security
criteria.description: The app employs robust security measures to protect users' sensitive financial information and prevent fraudulent activities.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The app tailors financial advice, recommendations, and budgeting tips to individual users based on their unique financial situations and goals.

criteria.name: Real-Time Data Access
criteria.description: The app provides real-time updates on income, expenses, cash flow, and other key financial metrics, giving users an accurate picture of their financial health at any moment.
